## Meeting Purpose

[Coordinate on Udemy project strategy and next steps for content creation and publication.](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus shifting to team leader/line of business leader audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Need to create high-level brief on content strategy idea and pitch for Udemy stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Exploring creation of external publication (like "Skill Graph") with repurposed and new content](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Challenges include defining content format, navigating existing resources, and aligning with Udemy's repositioning goals](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Direction

  - [Shift focus to team leader/line of business leader personas](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Create external publication (e.g., "Skill Graph") similar to Kanji's "Sequence"](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Repurpose existing content and create new content aligned with skills-first narrative](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Spotlight notable instructors through interviews and success stories](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Leverage existing resources (e.g., podcast, e-books) but improve presentation and accessibility](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

### Challenges and Considerations

  - [Difficulty in navigating Udemy's existing resources and identifying valuable content](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Need for clearer direction from Udemy on trending topics and new offerings](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Potential issues with instructor IP and proper attribution](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Slow website load times (14 seconds) impacting user experience](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Vague wording in existing content (e.g., "Tooling Up" e-book title)](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### Next Steps and Action Items

  - [Kyle to create a brief outlining current mindset and strategy for Udemy feedback](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Aim to get brief to Udemy by tomorrow, latest](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion for Thursday to align on next steps and roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Explore potential fallback option of improving SEO for existing Udemy business resources](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Matthew to watch previous call recording and provide additional thoughts by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)

### Project Management and Communication

  - [Establish clear point of contact (POC) with Udemy for smoother communication](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Kyle and Matthew to set up regular check-in cadence for better alignment](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Address challenges with strategy sprint timing and participation](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to create and send brief to Udemy stakeholders (by tomorrow at the latest)](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [Matthew to watch previous call recording and provide additional thoughts by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion for Thursday to review feedback and align on next steps](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Explore options for improving existing Udemy business resources as potential fallback](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Establish regular check-in cadence between Kyle and Matthew for better project alignment](https://fathom.video/share/-5q5yxL2hTfcKjxpkcHnUCHUKJusNyeS?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
